name: Cardfight!! Vanguard G: Stride Gate-hen
originName: Cardfight!! Vanguard G: Stride Gate Hen
description:
Team TRY3: Chrono, Shion, and Tokoha, managed to win the championship of Generation Quest. In the mean time, however, Ryuzu Myōjin has a secret plan: summoning Zodiac Time Beasts of Gear Chronicle clan to Earth. Chrono and Kouji want to stop Ryuzu, but they are confronted by a mysterious group of cardfighters known as "Company" who share Ryuzu's ideology.

(Source: Anime News Network)
